entry.title: Consecuences of activating obsolete REPORTS? Is there any casuistics about it?
entry.content:
Greetings community,

As you know, in ECC, the transaction F.75/F_75 exists (and still works) and is considered obsolete in the S4H environment. However, there's a procedure that can be used to reactivate it, even though SAP clearly states that they won't be responsible for any system crashes that occur as a result of reactivating obsolete programs.

The question is: If a company executes this report, what tangible error has actually been reported due to activating this or, in general, any other obsolete REPORT?

Thanks for your comments!

entry.title: Can we change the internal table data structure using Javascript?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We require Fragmented-based Adobe forms to change the layout and make some calculations as below.

Requirement Explanation in detail.

1. Table 1(Raw Data) shows the possible cases of materials packed in handling units. There is a chance of mixed cases as shown(ie., Multiple materials can be packed in a single pallet).

2. Table 2 - Format provided by Standard output type(DELIVERY_PACKING_LIST). Handling units followed by Materials packed.

3. Table 3 - Format required for our client to transpose the data and display it in the form.

 

Existing format provided in SAP Public cloud 
Handling UnitsMaterialQtyGross WeightGross Volume
HU1  50100
 33000018410  
HU2  50100
 33000018420  
HU3  50100
 33000018510  
HU4  50100
 33000018610  
HU5  50100
 33000018710  
 33000018815  
HU6  50100
 33000018920  
HU7  50100
 33000018910  
HU8  50100
 33000018910  
HU9  50100
 33000018910  
HU10  50100
 330000190
330000191		10
15		  

The required format for our client is as follows.

Kindly suggest.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How to restrict outbound delivery with respect to serial numbers
entry.content:
I did quality inspection for 3 finished goods, 2 Accepted(posted to unrestricted use) and 1 rejected (posted to blocked stock).
Unrestricted Use - EKON001 & EKON002 (Serial numbers)
Blocked Stock - EKON003 (Serial numbers)
SD team did the sales delivery for 2 qty (Picked EKON001 & EKON003), Although the EKON003 - serial number is blocked they can able to do the delivery!
Then I checked the stock overview EKON002 comes under the blocked stock, This leads to error of delivering defected material to customer.
How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number?
SAP Community 
UI SAP GUI for Windows

entry.title: Re: The quantity of role "Load" is greater than the deliv...
entry.content:
Hello , 

Try to repack  if deliveries involved with HU's from PRDO --> Follow on actions--> Pack  screen . 

Regards,

entry.title: How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number
entry.content:
I did quality inspection for 3 finished goods, 2 Accepted(posted to unrestricted use) and 1 rejected (posted to blocked stock).
Unrestricted Use - EKON001 & EKON002 (Serial numbers)
Blocked Stock - EKON003 (Serial numbers)
SD team did the sales delivery for 2 qty (Picked EKON001 & EKON003), Although the EKON003 - serial number is blocked they can able to do the delivery!
Then I checked the stock overview EKON002 comes under the blocked stock, This leads to error of delivering defected material to customer.
How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number?
SAP Community

entry.title: Re: error handling on process automation BPA with NO RPA
entry.content:
Hello, 

My suggestion is to handle the response itself by adding "conditions". Then perform the necessary steps required for your process like "Raise Alerts", "Send Email" or Add another "Process" that will process your exception. 🙂 

I hope it helps. 

Regards

-weisson

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How do we do printing and what kind of setup needs to be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Please follow the 1LQ set up guide: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

--See Also--

SAP Help - Document and Output Management

2941522 - Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Guided Answer

3223182 - Mandatory DKIM setup - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Listopad 2024
entry.content:
Za nami już ostatni SAP Stammtisch w 2024 roku!

Tym razem spotkaliśmy się w pubie Biała Małpa, lecz docelowo nie będzie to nasze miejsce spotkań, ponieważ w planach jest, by następne nasze spotkanie odbyło się w CyberTap w Katowicach.
Wydarzenie jest już dodane do kalendarza katowickiej Grupy, więc serdecznie zapraszamy do zgłaszania chęci uczestnictwa tutaj: katowice-sap-stammtisch-08-01-2025 

Cieszymy się, że na ostatnim spotkaniu Grupy dołączyły do nas osoby spoza regionu. Serdecznie pozdrawiamy Kraków i Poznań oraz zapraszamy ponownie 🙂
Każde spotkanie Grupy SAP Community Katowice, to zawsze ciekawe doświadczenie dla każdego uczestnika. Dlatego też cieszymy się, gdy poza znajomym kręgiem osób pracującym w technologii SAP, pojawia się ktoś nam nieznany, bo takie spotkania zawsze owocują nawiązaniem nowych znajomości oraz uświadamiają, że Świat SAPa, wcale nie jest taki wielki jak może się wydawać i gdzieś w naszej wędrówce zawodowej jest duża szansa przecięcia się z ciekawymi osobami, których spotkało na różnych eventach i z którymi ma się coś wspólnego.
Przyznacie, że ostatnie zdanie wyszło bardzo złożone współrzędnie, więc teraz podsumuję bardzo krótko.


Tak jak zawsze, ostatni SAP Stammtisch w Katowicach można śmiało zaliczyć do udanych 🙂

   

Następny SAP Stammtisch już 8 stycznia. Jak zwykle zapraszamy Was do wcześniejszych zapisów, co pomaga w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika i zachęca innych do przyjścia 🙂

entry.title: Re: Error auto cert refresh failed with response code 503...
entry.content:
Hi,
  
Hope you are doing good.

Yes, we are aware of this cockpit bug. You can ignore this Cockpit UI error message/ it does not affect the actual functionality.
It is caused by an internal program error and does not have an effect on your BTP cloud connectivity which still works normal. We are already working on a hotfix to prevent this error message from being displayed. In this case it is just a false alert and will disappear soon after patching from our side.

Apologies for any inconvenience caused.

 _ _ _ _ _ __ _ _ 
Kind Regards,
Hemanth Kumar
SAP Product Support
 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

entry.title: Re: Transport SAC excel addin reports from dev system to...
entry.content:
@Chanti 

Currently SAC Excel Add-in template are not transportable. You need to save the templates individually in each tenant.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: "Time valuation trace" documentation?
entry.content: Under Manage Data there is a "Time Valuation Trace" object. I tried playing around with it, but I can't figure out how to use it. And I can't find documentation using the search term "Time Valuation Trace". I have tried this community, Time Tracking Implementation Guide, Time Tracking Operation Guide, Me.SAP.com, and Perplexity/Google.  Can anyone point me to a how-to guide for this tool?

thank you for this helpful blog! When registering on the MyInvois Portal you get the client-ID, client secret 1 and client secret 2 --> which secret do we need to enter in the BTP app "Manage communication settings"?

Thanks!

Best regards,
Gerhard

entry.title: How can I create a view of a customer's payment history?
entry.content: I need help to create a view in SQL to get all the information about customers' payment history and their debts, including additional information such as the outstanding balance, the date the debt was acquired, and the due date of the debt.

entry.title: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Error The target table 'Table 1' is not created an
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am currently learning SAP Datasphere and working on a dataflow that involves tables from an SAP ECC system. While attempting to create and deploy the target table "Table 1," I encountered the following error:

The target table "Table 1" is not created and deployed.

Additionally, when I remove the target table, I receive this error:

The operator "Join 5" has unconnected input/output.

I have ensured that all joins are configured correctly and the source tables (VBAK, VBAP, MARA, MARC, KNA1, and ADRC) are loaded properly. However, I am stuck at this stage and unable to proceed with creating and deploying the target table.

Can someone guide me on how to resolve this issue? Are there any specific steps or configurations

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: Download link for 'SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Stu...
entry.content:
Problem solved by copying the hyperlink to a Brave browser instead of Chrome.
Strange, but I don't argue with success.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Erro...
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

It seems that there are no issues with regard to the inputs for "Join 5." In order to load the data, it is necessary to connect a table as a target. Here similar question was answered by Thore.

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Help with reporting layout in SAP Datasphere/ Analyti...
entry.content:
Hi, did you try to suppress via a script for the table? 

DSP with SAC -> a lot of functionalities one has in BW cannot be done id DSP self, but can be easily done in SAC via scripting. You can suppress dimensions or measures, add / remove them / ... via scripting.

entry.title: Re: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created...
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh,

Good question! I checked the two tutorials you mentioned, and it looks like you can consume custom RAP events from S/4HANA Private Cloud in a SAP BTP ABAP environment.

There might be a few details to work out, but give this a try as a way of building on what you've already figured out:

  1. How to Create RAP Business Events in an On-Premise system - Steps 8 - 11
  2. Event Consumption in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment - Steps 4 - 10

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Activate DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE The column SERVICE is unknown DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE cou
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I was implementing a note and this DLL error message appeared in the system.

How can I fix it?

Below are the evidence of the error.

 

Activate DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE
   The column SERVICE is unknown

 

   DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE could not be activated

 

   Synchronous processing: 0 sec., 1 objects, 1 costs

 

   *************************************************************************
         Object Activation
   End phase  002 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 003 **********************************************************
         Buffer Synchronization for Dependent Ref.to DTEL/T
   *************************************************************************

 

   *************************************************************************
         Buffer Synchronization for Dependent Ref.to DTEL/T
   End phase  003 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 004 **********************************************************
         Set ROOT/COMPOSITION rootnode relations for mass a
   *************************************************************************

 

   *************************************************************************
         Set ROOT/COMPOSITION rootnode relations for mass a
   End phase  004 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 005 **********************************************************
         Final log
   *************************************************************************

 

   The following errors or warnings have occurred:

 

   DDL Source EDOD_DC_USAGE could not be activated
   (E- The column service is unknown )
   (Package: GLO-EDO, SW-Comp: S4CORE, Appl-Comp: CA-GTF-CSC)

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP COCKPIT | cloud foundary deployment error
entry.content:
When deploying a Python application to Cloud Foundry and encountering a crash, such as the one you've described, there are several steps you can take to troubleshoot and resolve the issue. 

The key parts of the log you provided indicate that the application crashed due to a "Codependent step exited."  Please find below given few potential issues:

1. Memory Limit: The application might be exceeding the memory limit specified in your manifest.yml. -  Increase Memory Quota allocation in manifest.yml 

2. Dependencies: There could be issues with your application's dependencies or configuration.- Look for any stack traces or error messages that could give you more insight into why the application is crashing.

3. Environment Variables: Missing or misconfigured environment variables could lead to crashes. - Make sure that any required environment variables are set correctly. You can set environment variables in your manifest.yml

4. Application Code: There might be bugs in your code that only manifest in the Cloud Foundry environment. - Look for unhandled exceptions or resource-intensive operations or Ensure that your app can handle multiple requests if it's a web application.

Regards, Ravi

entry.title: Re: Activate DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE The column SERVICE is unknown DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE cou
entry.content: Contact SAP support.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Linkage with ACDOCA and ACDOCP in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
how are ACT1 data populated in ACDOCP table?

thank you

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content:
I always recommend using/creating an independent "Dates"-universe, where you can set all the required date-parameters/values for the entire reporting, e.g. "today", "yesterday", "first day of week", "end of month", ... , etc.
You can add this to every WebI-report as a separate query, add all the required date-values to one or multiple prompts and then "filter" your line-items in the second query based on the "Result from another query".

entry.title: Didn't receive the redemption code for digital skills initiative
entry.content: Hello @David_Chaviano , I finished learning a while ago and sent the screenshots twice over email and didn't get any replies till now and we are approaching the deadline and i really need that voucher need to get my certificate before 2024 ends please be my Santa for this year.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 sap.ui.export.Spreadsheet issue on Fiori Launc...
entry.content:
Hi oliveiraa,
The problem with the provision results from the large data set that is bound to dataSource and comes from oTable.getBinding(“rows”), and triggers the export document popup.
Recommended Solutions:
const oRowbinding = oTable.getBinding("rows").getCurrentContexts().map(oContext => oContext.getObject());
Or:
const oRowbinding = oTable.getBinding("rows").getContexts().map(oContext => oContext.getObject());

Or:

const aRows = this.oSystemsTable.getRows();
const aData = aRows.map(oRow => oRow.getBindingContext().getObject());

These approaches respect the current filters and sorting applied to the table.

If the above doesn’t work:
const oRowbinding = oTable.getBinding("rows").oList;
Note: This solution does not respect table filters and sorting.

For further details, refer to the sap.ui.model.ListBinding documentation, and class sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding

In addition, the following property is required in the oSetting object for server deployment:

const oSettings = {
                workbook: {
                    columns: aCols
                },
                dataSource: oRowBinding,
                worker: false,
            };

Best regards,
Amir

entry.title: Re: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for tim...
entry.content: Hi Martin, Thanks for the links but unfortunately this doesnt resolve my issue. My issue is that if in BW I double click on Time related infoobject such as 0CalMonth then I can go to where used-list and can see the different objects in which 0calmonth is used such as ADSO, infocube, Transformation etc. I need to know that how can I find the same info for the time related objects in S4/HANA such as CDS views extractors in which time related object is used. For example, that I need to know which CDS view or extractor a technical field WADAT_IST which is actual goods movement date is used. Is there a way in S4 ?

entry.title: Re: Setup properly SAP Commerce 2205.31 on-prem in local...
entry.content:
Hi  
The error you getting seems like SolrServerConfig is missing from your data.
You can try creating them by using the below impex, it not already existing.

 

INSERT_UPDATE SolrServerConfig ; name[unique=true] ; mode(code) ; username   ; password  ; indexingUsername   ; indexingPassword
                               ; Default           ; standalone ; solrclient ; client123 ; solrindexingclient ; indexingclient123
                               ; Local Standalone  ; standalone ; solrclient ; client123 ; solrindexingclient ; indexingclient123
                               ; Local Cloud       ; cloud      ; solrclient ; client123 ; solrindexingclient ; indexingclient123

 

@frnk83

entry.title: Re: getting error in spreadsheet download after deploymen...
entry.content:
I have answered the issue in the following:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sapui5-sap-ui-export-spreadsheet-issue-on-fiori-launchpad/qaq-p/12460280

I hope this works.

entry.title: Re: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created...
entry.content:
Hi Tuncay,

Thanks for answering.

If you look at step 4 of Event Consumption in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment a .json (event metadata) file is required for creating the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. Now if you look at How to Create RAP Business Events in an On-Premise system this file is never generated and hence not available for creating the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. And that is the answer I'm looking for - How do we generate the event metadata file for custom RAP events in an private cloud or on-premise system. You can generate the event metadata file on a public cloud system for custom events as is mentioned in step 3 of Event Consumption in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment but this step is not available in the private cloud. Let me know if you have any other suggestions.

 

Thanks again.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: cannot activate SAP on cal.sap.com Quota exceeded eve...
entry.content:
It's an old question, but I decided to post my answer here because the problem seems to still exist and because when you google the problem, this question comes up first.

I recently had the same problem and couldn't find a solution online, but I solved the problem myself and will share it with others. I will describe the issue in detail below, but for those who want a quick summary, the solution was to end my Google account's free trial by in one click on "Activate" on the page https://console.cloud.google.com/. It is important to note that you keep the $300 credit received at the beginning of the trail period even after your account is fully activated. After that, I was able to increase the Compute Engine API "N2 CPUs" (N2_CPUS) quotas at https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas for the "europe-west3" region (Germany, Frankfurt) from the default value of 8 to 48 (in my case, a minimum of 34 was required). The "Edit quota" action was enabled after I finished the trial. In less than a minute, the request was approved and I was able to retry installing the appliance at https://cal.sap.com/.

The long description is the following: I wanted to create SAP Solution Manager 7.2 instance from the template at https://cal.sap.com/. After analyzing of information from the Cost Calculator of Appliance Template at https://cal.sap.com/ and the Lower latency in the Google Cloud Region Picker (https://cloud.withgoogle.com/region-picker/) I concluded that Google Cloud Platform in region "europe-west3" is the best choice for our needs. I was new to Google Cloud and created a new account. Because Google offered $300 free credits on their homepage (see https://cloud.google.com/free/docs/gcp-free-tier/#free-trial) I used the option:

Everything looks fine until I get the error message "limits reached ... - Quota 'N2_CPUS' exceeded. Available: 8, Requested: 34". I tried to edit quota at https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas to increase Compute Engine API "N2 CPUs" (N2_CPUS) quota for the "europe-west3" (Germany, Frankfurt) region from the default value 8, but "Edit quota" action was disabled.
Only after careful research on many Google Cloud pages did I find some limitations on the use of Compute Engine for trial accounts at https://cloud.google.com/free/docs/free-cloud-features#free-tier-usage-limits. In my case, I was sure that I had to use Google Cloud. So I finished the usage of trail period by clicking "Activate" on the Google Cloud console https://console.cloud.google.com/. It was enough to activate my full account. I kept the $300 credit, which I received at the start of the trail.

After that, I was able to increase the Compute Engine API "N2 CPUs" (N2_CPUS) quotas at https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas for the "europe-west3" region (Germany, Frankfurt) from the default value of 8 to 48 (in my case, a minimum of 34 was required). The "Edit quota" action was enabled after I finished the trial:


If I had chosen the region "europe-west1" instead of the region "europe-west3", I had no such problems at all because the default value for the the region "europe-west1" was 48 by default.

The "Increase requests" was approved in less then 1 min

and I could go back to https://cal.sap.com/ and retry installing the appliance.

I hope this information can be helpful for others who may have the same problem.

entry.title: Alert for late return from break?
entry.content: Is there a way to detect a late return from a break?  The valuation rule type " Filter Single Records from Input Groups" I see for detecting late arrival only has Comparison Group Attributes "earliest start time" and "latest end time."

entry.title: Issue while trying SAP BTP, Kyma runtime mission
entry.content:
Hello There,

I am trying the mission: "Build an Application in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime". Mission is located at:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-kyma-mocks.html

I am using Trail account for this mission. I am running in to following three issues:

1. In step 7 of section "Deploy Commerce Mock Application in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime", once I go back to "Cluster Details" page then I do not see Integration > Applications.

2. I am not able to add new modules that are prequisite for the section "Use Redis in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime to Store and Retrieve Data". If I try to search for any of the following modules: Serverless, Eventing, or NATS. I do not get results.

3. In step 1 of "Use Redis in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime to Store and Retrieve Data", once I click Upload, it never finishes.

Is it possible that the documentation of this mission is outdated?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

February 26th, 2025 is a Wednesday, not a weekend date. Can you please confirm it is correct?

  • Hotfix Collection 5 for Release 2502 | February 26th – 27th, 2025

entry.title: Re: Deleting GL Accounts
entry.content: Getting error message reset number ranges required message ni bloo1

entry.title: Account determination for entry INT GBB ____ BSA 3120 not possible
entry.content:
While performing goods receipt using transaction MIGO, someone system though an error i.e. "Account determination for entry INT GBB ____ BSA 3120 not possible"

 

To mitigate this issue, execute transaction OBYC and then double click on GBB and then Pass Chart of Accounts INT and maintain the missing entry by copying existing entry.

entry.title: Re: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Error message in Customer return without reference
entry.content:
While adding Account ID, and currency to the return, system shows an error message "Party with role Account missing".

When adding the account the system raised a new error "
Item 10: Only one business partner of role Account permitted" You have permission.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error message in Customer return without reference
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

This error happens when sales org details have not been maintained under sales data of the account. 

In order for a sales document to accurately determine the involved parties for an account, it is necessary to update the sales data correctly before creating the document. As a result, the system is currently unable to determine the details in the document.

 

Best regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) lookup on calculated dimension based on dimension property id
entry.content:
Hi All,

Since CONCAT is not yet available in data action advanced formula. We have created a calculated dimension based on dimension "store" & "year_month". 

Based on this calculated dimension, we need to perform a lookup from another dimension in the same model, to get the store status (store status like New, renovation, closed, etc)

Hence, In SAC Dashboard (optimised story with GL accounts) , for a calculated dimension, is there a way to perform a lookup based on another dimension property attribute within the same model ?

@N1kh1l @analytics SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this requirement.

entry.title: Re: In DataPaging SAP MDK, paging is not showing new data.
entry.content: @ashish_kumar2905 Good news, we have fixed the original issue. Please test your MDK web app with 24.11 release.

entry.title: How to group the multiple rental units into different type of groups to contract
entry.content:

How to create a multiplegroups for the different type of rental objectives, ex: Senior, Junior and worker services, requirement is assigned to the rental units to objective groups, those objective group should be to the contacts.

 Best regards,

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Erro...
entry.content: You need to deploy the target table. That is all 🙂 The table is just proposed, not yet deployed. First deploy the target table, then deploy the view

entry.title: Re: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for tim...
entry.content:
Hi, yeah, sometimes I totally misunderstand the questions :(. Unfortunately not only in the forum. So you are not asking about DSP, nor SAC but to S/4.

Try Tables:
IXTRCTNENBLDVW
DHCDCVCDSEXTRE
CMMPOITMDX

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/discover-cds-view-based-extractors-from-sap-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13391593

entry.title: Execute PPF action 2 times (PWO)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we have the requirement that 2 different forms should be printed for a warehouse process type. One when the warehouse order is created and the other after the warehouse tasks have been confirmed. I have made the following settings in /SCWM/PRWO6 (see appendix).

 


Unfortunately, this doesn't  work. The action is only executed when the warehouse order is created, but not when the warehouse tasks are confirmed. Do you have any idea how I should proceed here?

entry.title: EWM - Method or function module to delete stock reference
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
is there a method or a function module that deletes the stock reference? It concerns the storage types that maintain the stock reference (not delete it):

For these, we would like to create a function to delete the stock reference for certain stocks so that they dont't need to manually transferred to a storage bin where the stock reference is deleted an back.

entry.title: Re: Push all individual records in a single mail
entry.content:
We can achieve this in multiple ways

  1. By using Gather
  2. Data Store operations  -> Write & Select
  3. Looping process call

 

Hope everyone know how to achieve this using gather

Here we use Data store operations

Iflow:

 

 

Input Data:

<root>
<employees>
<errorMessage>19872 Record updated successfully</errorMessage>
<errorCode>1</errorCode>
</employees>
<employees>
<errorMessage>20383 Record updated successfully</errorMessage>
<errorCode>1</errorCode>
</employees>
<employees>
<errorMessage>21385 Record updated successfully</errorMessage>
<errorCode>1</errorCode>
</employees>
</root>

 

 

 

Using  Sequential Multicast for Date store Operations

Branch 1:

General Splitter

 

 

Router 1:

 

Store Fail Records:

 

 

Store Success Records:

 

Branch 2:

Select:All_Success_Records

 

Router 2

 

Branch 3:

Select:All_Fail_Records

 

Router 3:

 

Thanks,

Pavan Koppula

Thanks. Yes, you are right, I have corrected it, you will see it soon.

The update to HFC5 will take place on March 1st and 2nd, 2025.

Best regards, 

Andreas

entry.title: Join our on-site SAP Customer Checkout Consultant Training in New York 2025
entry.content:
Dear partners and customers,

Ready to elevate your expertise? Join us for the SAP Customer Checkout Consultant Training in New York and gain the expertise to implement and position our integrated POS solution for retail, catering, and sports and entertainment effectively.

💡 What’s in it for you?

  • Master the set-up, configuration, and implementation of SAP Customer Checkout for customer projects
  • Learn best practices to position the solution for maximum impact
  • Engage with our experts and explore implementation strategies
  • Network with like-minded professionals in the field

📅 When?
 January 14th, 2025 (starting at 12:00 PM) to January 17th, 2025

📍 Where?
 SAP New York
 10 Hudson Yards,
 10001 New York, United States

💼 This is your chance to elevate your skills, connect with professionals, and be part of a transformative journey in the POS area.

🔗 REGISTER NOW!

Let's shape the future of POS together. 🌟

We are looking forward to meet you in person 😊 !

Best regards,

Elena Vavitsa

Marketing Lead for SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: Key User extensibility in Article Master Maintenance
entry.content:
The Key User Extensibility feature in SAP allows key users to extend the Article Master Maintenance across various business contexts, such as Product Basic Data, Product Plant, and Product Retail Data. This functionality empowers business users to adapt the system to their specific needs without requiring in-depth technical knowledge or coding.

This new feature on Article Master is added starting from SAP S/4Hana 2022 and this Functionality involves the Fiori Apps "Custom Fields and Logic", App ID F1481.

Business Scenario - Let's assume we need field on the Basic Data of the Article Master called Maximum Packaging Height.

Before you start, ensure all the necessary roles are added to your user.

Open the App and add the Field

 

now click on Create.

next, go in the edit mode and enable the usage based on the business requirement

Next, Save and Publish the App.

No go the Product Master App

Search for your Article and go the detail view.

Click on your user icon and choose Adapt UI

This will take you the Adapt UI Mode, then right click on the place the new field needs to be added.

and select add Field and choose the new field

Activate the change.

entry.title: GenAI as an accelerator for innovation and sustainable revenue growth in Manufacturing
entry.content:
While AI alone won’t solve all business challenges in the  manufacturing industry, it has the potential to significantly enhance profitability and drive operational efficiency, allowing manufacturers to reduce costs, optimize resource allocation, and make better data-driven decisions. Its strength lies in its ability to navigate complex systems—ranging from production lines to supply chains to sales operations. Since these systems are closely interconnected, even minor adjustments in one area can lead to substantial changes elsewhere. By analyzing large datasets from diverse manufacturing operations, AI can reveal hidden patterns and inefficiencies that traditional automation might miss. This insight empowers manufacturers to optimize resource use, minimize non-value-added tasks, and adopt more sustainable practices, ultimately driving a profitable and sustainable future for the company.

 

AI’s capabilities can also empower businesses to monitor changes, predict outcomes, and enhance system performance in ways that were once unimaginable. For instance, consider GEnAI trained on extensive datasets of manufacturing variances. These systems can swiftly analyze millions of options to identify the best materials and suppliers for cost-effective product development—far more rapidly than traditional methods.

Additionally, AI-driven product configuration harnesses data from historical sales orders, supply chain forecasts, and IoT sensors to help manufacturers optimize resource and labor usage. This not only improves business performance but also reduces inefficiencies in the sales process by minimizing unknown variables through real time insights and detailed analysis of each sales opportunity for better decision making.

 

 

Let’s take a close look to some typical use cases.

In the Field Service Management area, GenAI has a significant impact on manufacturer service departments as it can deliver advanced knowledge to the technician to improve service execution or help automate repetitive activities. In field service GenAI can optimize inventory logistics including stocking and inventory location given when and where inventory may be required, which is a common challenge when a service order is set and task and parts need to be planned. In this case, AI can provide an indication of the best available part or best option for a part needed within a service order.

When the service call is completed, GenAI can automatically generate service documentation, reducing time from service to invoice and automating a highly manual process traditionally prone to human errors.

Another use case scenario is in supply chain for configurable product options forecast. In this case, manufacturers are facing supply chain disruptions more frequently that impact their operations and financial performance. Like all disruptions in the market, these are difficult to anticipate.

By leveraging GenAI, planners can act on external signals that impact the supply chain planning process, allowing manufacturers to significantly enhance their supply chain resilience. The ability to predict disruptions, analyze real-time data, and automate decision-making allows them to respond proactively to short-term shortages, minimizing the impact on operational continuity, costs and customer orders.

More specifically, in the Configure-to-Order scenarios the value of GenAI is significant. GenAI can analyze data from historical orders, external trends and sales orders to improve forecasting accuracy for components used to make customized products,  helping match supply and demand in the short term and making insight-driven decisions for the company medium-term business planning.

AI won’t single-handedly solve most urgent business problems in the industry, but it offers a powerful tool to scale and expedite strategic efforts, like in the case of AI capabilities for customer communications and follow ups. From efficient summarization of business data to faster collaboration with customers , AI enables businesses to measure and optimize resources in ways that traditional methods can't match.

While the technology’s possibilities continue to grow, companies need to re imagine entire domains and workflows rather than isolated use cases. Although there are a few use cases mentioned in this article,  the number of use cases possibilities is endless. Companies need to be selective about where to invest in AI because most of the use cases in large enterprises with resources to develop their own GenAI solutions reach a sufficient level of accuracy after several iterations of fine-tuning, model improvement or data labeling.

entry.title: Focused Build SP15: Improvements in Mass Change Operations Fiori Application
entry.content:
Introduction

We have released Service Pack(SP) 15 of Focused Build (ST-OST) earlier this month and as all ways with the new SP a lot of exciting and valuable features have been added to our Focused Build fiori applications. You can find more information about all the improvements in different areas of the Requirements-to-deploy process in the blog detailed out here.

In this blog post let's discuss the enhancements which are delivered in Mass Change Operations fiori application (MCA) in detail.

Addition of Tester and Test Team for Work Packages and Work Items

Prior to ST-OST 15 the Tester and Test Team fields were missing from work packages process type and Test Team was missing from work items process type of Mass Change Operation application. This behaviour was not in sync with the My Work Packages and My Work Items generic applications. We have added these fields now in MCA in filter bar, result list table and mass change dialog sections. With the addition of these fields now it is possible to filter the result list table of work packages and work items by Tester and Test Team fields. It is also now possible to edit these field values directly in the result list table and also from mass change dialog. The download excel feature also supports these two fields now.

Fig 1. Tester and Test Team in FilterBar

Fig 2. Tester and Test Team in Mass Change Dialog

Also, both the Tester and Test Team fields are interdependent on each other by default. That means if a Test Team is selected and we try to search the Tester for the same work package or work item then only the testers which are part of the selected Test Team are returned. This behaviour is also extended to generic apps along with the Developer and Development Team fields. If you wish to switch off this interdependency between these fields then it can be done by setting the below two parameters in our AGS_WORK_CUSTOM parameter table.

  • FB_DEV_TEAM_DISABLE - Set this parameter with the value X for switching off dependency between Developer and Development Team
  • FB_TEST_TEAM_DISABLE - Set this parameter with the value X for switching off dependency between Tester and Test Team

Please note, once you switch off this dependency from the mentioned fields then it would apply for these fields across all process types in generic app, mass change operations app and requirements management app.

Date format harmonization

All the applications under the Focused Build Requirement-to-Deploy portfolio contain date fields in their screens. However, it was observed that the date values in these fields were displayed in different formats for different applications. 

Respecting the Fiori guidelines, the date format for all fields has been harmonized across all the applications with SP15. 

Fig 3. MCA old date format

Fig 4. MCA new date format

Fig 5. Generic app new date format

In the Mass Change Operations application, the users can now also search for Work Packages and Work Items by 2 new filters, Created at and Changed at. These columns are also a part of the result list. 

Fig 7. MCA harmonized date range maintenance

Fields editability harmonization

One more new feature in Focused Build that enhances the editability of fields in the Mass Change Application and Generic Application. This update streamlines the management of Work Packages, Work Items, Request for Change, and Change documents by allowing fields to be editable under specific statuses and read-only under others. Most fields are managed through status-dependent customization. You can access this via: 

SPRO->SAP Solution Manager->Capabilities-> Requirements Management-> Change Request Management Framework->Configure status-dependent UI element control.

Fig 6. Status dependent editability of fields

Customization for Project and Wave: Existing UI elements are reused for project and wave customization. For all other fields, new UI elements are created with "/SALM" namespace. Currently these customization settings apply exclusively to the Mass Change Application and Generic Application.

For a comprehensive list of fields that can be edited under specific statuses, please refer to the Field Editability Matrix available on the SAP Support Portal. You can access it via: 

Product Details -> Product Capabilities -> Functions in Detail ->Editability of fields in Mass Change Operations (xlsx) 

This feature is designed to improve efficiency and reduce errors by providing the right level of control over your workflows. 

Key Takeaways

  • Missing fields Tester and Test Team are added in MCA for work packages and work items with added dependency by default.
  • Date and date range fields are harmonized across all the applications.
  • Field editability is harmonized in MCA for certain process types to overcome the past shortcomings.

Please feel free to provide feedback either directly here in the comment section or, in case of questions, you can submit them here. You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager tag  here and Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager tag  here. 

Important Links and Resources

  • Usage Rights
  • SP15 delta presentation to get an overview of the changes and read the highlights blog
  • SP15 delivered features overview blog
  • Read how SAP Activate and Focused Build with SAP Solution Manager is working together
  • ALM Community page

entry.title: SAP B1 in Canada is it possible to turn of AP Invoice Tax rounding
entry.content: We have a client in Canada, using TAX defined as 13%, but when the users enters the actual TAX amount on Vendor Invoice, when we post the invoice the document amount changes when posted due to the system rounding the TAX

entry.title: Re: Interplay between Vite and SAP Approuter
entry.content:
Hello Julian,

Thank you very much for the great blog for the developers who will use ReactJS with CAP.

For local development; It can be good if you also add "authenticationMethod" to the xs-app.json file.

Ex:

 

"authenticationMethod": "none"

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
Thanks it will resolve to some extend by removing unwanted record in below example where lgort = L100 but didn't fix fully as it will do the SUM at lgort level. meaning if lgort is having 2 values on selection screen say L101 & L201 then matnr having 2 SUM entries one for L101 and other one for L201. expectation is it should SUM both lgort values and show one entry.

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L100, lbst = 10,  

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L101, lbst = 10,

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L101, lbst = 20,

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L201, lbst = 10,

Result is

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 30,

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 10,

expected

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 40,

I somehow tried to make ITAB also CDS and joined in CDS1 and added lgort in CDS2 to make it available for filter (as per your reply) 

Define view ZCDS1
as select distinct from mard

inner join ITAB_CDS on ITAB_CDS.matnr = mard.matnr and ITAB_CDS.werks = mard.werks
{
key matnr,
key werks,
key lgort,
labst
}

Define view ZCDS2

as select from ZCDS1

{
key matnr,

 lgort,
sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr

In report:

select ZCDS2~matnr
          ZCDS2~stock
from ZCDS2
inner join ZCDS1 on ZCDS1~matnr = ZCDS2~matnr
 where ZCDS2~lgort in @s_lgort
into table @DATA(lt_stock).

entry.title: Re: Capacity Planning Production Order should not release...
entry.content:
Hi Tejas,

You can use Fiori Apps Capacity Scheduling Table, Capacity Scheduling Board and Manage Work Center Capacity to level the overload/capacity.

BR

SKAEAD

entry.title: How to Bind Applications to Pre-Existing Schemas in HANA Cloud (BTP Cloud Foundry)?
entry.content:
I recently migrated a HANA Service DB (BTP Neo) to HANA Cloud in BTP Cloud Foundry. In this setup, several schemas were created in the HANA Cloud database using a technical user.

Now, we have applications deployed in Cloud Foundry that need to access these schemas. I want to create service bindings between these applications and the pre-existing schemas in HANA Cloud.

Is it possible to create a service instance of type hana with the schema plan for an already existing schema? how can it be achieved?

If not, what would be the recommended approach to bind applications to pre-existing schemas?

entry.content:
Hi , 

how to use this template in case that business needs to do PI for specific HU within different storage Bins?

entry.title: Posting only possible in periods 2024/12 and 2024/10 in company code. Message No. M7053
entry.content:
Hi, Can anyone please assist me on this issue. When i enter the stock through MB1C am getting this issue. Posting only possible in periods 2024/12 and 2024/10 in company code. Message No. M7053.

Even I tried MMRV & MMPV to close and open the period. Still it didn't work.

entry.title: Regarding updating BLOB in BTP Cloud Hana DB via CAPM oData V4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We have a requirement to upload a file to the Hana DB Table in BTP Cloud. The table is created via CAP Model entity and the field is LargeBinary and annotated as MediaType (pdf).

Based on the CAP Entity, we have created Service file also and the oData V4 is generated successfully.

Now while trying to upload the file via file Uploader UI, the update is not happening.

As a troubleshoot method, we created a standard Fiori List Report and it worked as expected.

We would like to upload the file in our custom Freestyle application which sometimes ended up in Error 413 (request payload too large). The same oData service works from postman as well.

We also tried in two parts, Creating a record with UUID and then update the file with PUT  method. This also did not work as expected.

Attached the CAP, UI5 code etc.

Any help in this regards is highly appreciated.

Best Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: SAP PS Master Data Templates
entry.content:
Hello All

Where can I find the templates for SAP PS master data ?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: MDK 24.11 - Android crash everytime hit enter on an empty Simple Property
entry.content:
MDK 24.11

Android 14.0

If you press enter on Android Keyboard on an empty Simple Property, the app crash.

 

An uncaught Exception occurred on "main" thread.
Parameter specified as non-null is null: method com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction, parameter event

StackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Parameter specified as non-null is null: method com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction, parameter event
    at com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction(Unknown Source:8)
    at android.widget.TextView.onEditorAction(TextView.java:8255)
    at com.android.internal.inputmethod.EditableInputConnection.performEditorAction(EditableInputConnection.java:175)
    at android.view.inputmethod.InputConnectionWrapper.performEditorAction(InputConnectionWrapper.java:253)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl.lambda$performEditorAction$22(RemoteInputConnectionImpl.java:697)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl.$r8$lambda$Jl5UsxtFJ64KyE-rGTA_d_NwhC4(Unknown Source:0)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl$$ExternalSyntheticLambda32.run(D8$$SyntheticClass:0)
    at android.os.Handler.handleCallback(Handler.java:959)
    at android.os.Handler.dispatchMessage(Handler.java:100)
    at android.os.Looper.loopOnce(Looper.java:232)
    at android.os.Looper.loop(Looper.java:317)
    at android.app.ActivityThread.main(ActivityThread.java:8705)
    at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Native Method)
    at com.android.internal.os.RuntimeInit$MethodAndArgsCaller.run(RuntimeInit.java:580)
    at com.android.internal.os.ZygoteInit.main(ZygoteInit.java:886)

Can you check please ?

entry.title: FI-AA: When added a new interval, the asset master not showing old interval
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently added a new interval in T-Code AS02 (Change Asset Master Record). Upon saving, an intracompany transfer document was automatically posted. However, I noticed that all the old intervals are no longer visible.

Could anyone guide me on how to view the history of interval changes in AS02 or related transactions?

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content: Hello Stefan, is there a way to save the selected hierarchies on page level? Creating a view won't show the selected hierarchies on page level after re-opening the view that has been created.

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM API & Integration: Tasks/Defects/Requirements to Jira
entry.content:
Hi @Tripti10,

 

I’ve encountered similar findings during my implementation and testing process. The status synchronization limitation and the requirement for separate API calls were particularly noticeable. Implementing one of the suggested workarounds could help achieve smoother integration and better synchronization between SAP Cloud ALM and Jira.

 

Possible Workarounds

1. Middleware Component (SAP Cloud Integration):

• Develop a middleware component that processes requests from SAP Cloud ALM and sends the appropriate API calls to Jira, depending on the action type (e.g., status changes vs. general updates).

2. Jira Automation Rule:

• Use Jira Automation to fetch the current status from SAP Cloud ALM whenever changes are made and automatically update the corresponding Jira task.

 

Initial Task Synchronization

 

For the initial synchronization of tasks, it would be feasible to develop a custom Import Tool that:

• Creates Jira tickets based on tasks from SAP Cloud ALM.

• Establishes the corresponding links between the two systems.

• Performs the initial synchronization of data.

 

This approach would enable more tailored integration logic, aligned with specific project requirements.

 

Let me know what you think!
